name: create_article_post
description: Share an article or URL on LinkedIn with a custom title, description, thumbnail, and commentary text. Useful for sharing blog posts, news articles, or product announcements.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: URN of the post author (urn:li:person:{id} or urn:li:organization:{id}).

parameters.name: commentary
parameters.description: Text commentary accompanying the shared article.
parameters.example: Great read on the future of AI in enterprise software.

parameters.name: article_source
parameters.description: The URL of the article being shared.

parameters.name: article_title
parameters.description: Custom title for the article link preview.
parameters.example: The Future of AI in Enterprise Software

parameters.name: article_description
parameters.description: Custom description for the article link preview.
parameters.example: An in-depth analysis of how AI is transforming enterprise workflows.

body.author: urn:li:organization:5515715
body.commentary: Great read on the future of AI in enterprise software.

article.title: The Future of AI in Enterprise Software
article.description: An in-depth analysis of how AI is transforming enterprise workflows.
